_meta.notes: Hand-authored (not a live capture) used ONLY by the M3b career-detail golden dual-run (dual-run.test.tsx) and stream test (stream.test.tsx). career.status.contracts entries (CareerViewProvider.BuildContractList) never carry `optional`/`parameterType`/altitude-bound fields on their parameters — decompile-confirmed exact `{title, state}` shape, career-capture-extend-report.md — so a byte-identical dual-run needs a legacy fixture whose parameters never set `optional: true` or `parameterType` either (every other ContractManager fixture has at least one optional/typed parameter, which the new wire can never reproduce).

contracts.active.title: Rescue Kerbal from orbit of Kerbin

parameters.title: Land near the Mun's north pole

contracts.offered.title: Test RT-10 solid fuel booster in flight
